title: Balanced Netherite Upgrade Recipe
description: Adds an alternative recipe for the netherite upgrade smithing template which uses a netherite ingot.
body:
Adds an alternative recipe for the netherite upgrade smithing template which uses a netherite ingot.
Great if you can't find a bastion, while still being expensive to encourage exploration

![image of new netherite upgrade smithing template recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cedeb6c1b123c366e8081cabce7e389bc078b8b.png)

> This datapack does **NOT** replace the duplication recipe, it only adds a new alternative
